query: SELECT sr.id, sr.userId, sr.moduleId, sr.scenarioId, sr.score, sr.status, sr.createdAt, m.code as module_code FROM scenario_runs sr LEFT JOIN modules m ON sr.moduleId = m.id WHERE sr.userId = 3990014 ORDER BY sr.createdAt DESC;
